title: Replace cardio dog image with equipment and add new hero background

requirements.summary: Replace the black French Bulldog workout image in the Cardio Zone section of the image gallery with a photo of actual cardio equipment from the facility
acceptanceCriteria: The black French Bulldog image is removed from the Cardio Zone section in the image gallery
A real cardio equipment photo from Bodyshape Fitness facility is displayed in the Cardio Zone section
The image maintains consistent dimensions and styling with other gallery images

file_operations.description: Replace the 'french-bulldog-cardio.dim_800x600.png' image reference in the Cardio Zone section with the generated cardio equipment image 'frontend/public/assets/generated/cardio-equipment.dim_800x600.png'. Update the image src path and maintain the existing alt text and styling to ensure consistent presentation with other gallery images.

requirements.summary: Replace the homepage hero section background with the uploaded Bodyshape Fitness 20 Year Anniversary image, applying fade/opacity effects for visual impact while maintaining content readability
acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded 20 Year Anniversary image (86b32a34-8ef3-4143-8e81-c566b3678f98.png) is set as the background for the hero section
The image is positioned and sized appropriately to serve as the main visual centerpiece
Fade/opacity effects are applied to ensure text and other content remain readable over the background
The styling is responsive and looks good on mobile and desktop viewports

file_operations.description: Update the hero section to use the uploaded 20 Year Anniversary image 'frontend/public/assets/generated/86b32a34-8ef3-4143-8e81-c566b3678f98.png' as a background image. Apply CSS background properties (background-image, background-size: cover, background-position: center) to the hero container. Add an overlay layer with reduced opacity (e.g., bg-black/50 or bg-gradient-to-b) to create the fade effect and ensure the existing hero text, 20th anniversary badge, and call-to-action buttons remain readable. Ensure responsive behavior using Tailwind responsive classes.
